scripts.dev:backend: NODE_ENV=development cd backend && npm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend:alt: cd frontend && PORT=3002 npm run dev
scripts.dev:backend:alt: NODE_ENV=development cd backend && PORT=4002 npm run dev
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run sync-port && npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm install && npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend && npm run clean && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run postbuild
scripts.install:frontend: cd frontend && npm install critters && npm install
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://noce-florale.onrender.com/graphql NODE_ENV=production npm run build
scripts.build:frontend:dev: cd frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:4000/graphql NODE_ENV=development npm run build
scripts.build:frontend:prod: cd frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=/graphql NODE_ENV=production npm run build
scripts.postbuild: echo "Starting postbuild process..." && mkdir -p backend/public && echo "Copying static export..." && cp -r frontend/out/. backend/public/ && echo "Postbuild completed successfully. Static site exported to backend/public/"
scripts.switch:dev: echo 'Switching to development mode' && export NODE_ENV=development && echo 'NODE_ENV is now set to development'
scripts.switch:prod: echo 'Switching to production mode' && export NODE_ENV=production && echo 'NODE_ENV is now set to production'
